description: Fig & Bloom social-media creative library. The agent selects ONE template, writes copy for the content tokens, copies style-preset rows verbatim, then renders to a flat PNG. No HTML is generated — only token values.

ratios.1080x1920: Story — primary canvas (all 8 source PSDs are this ratio)
ratios.1080x1350: Post — 4:5. Templates reflow to this, not just crop.

render.dependency: puppeteer skill — verify with: node -e "require('puppeteer'); console.log('OK')"
render.method: 1. Pick a template. 2. Write content-token values. 3. Copy a style-preset row (+ any per-template preset) verbatim. 4. Save tokens to a JSON file. 5. node references/scripts/render.js --template <id> --tokens vals.json --all-ratios --output-dir out/. 6. Parse __RENDER_MANIFEST__: ok:true, every result errors:[]. 7. Present PNGs for approval.

shell_tokens.TITLE: optional creative name
shell_tokens.CONTENT: the filled template, injected between <!-- CONTENT_START --> and <!-- CONTENT_END -->

render.ASSETS_BASE: Resolved by render.js to file://<references>/illustrations. Templates reference illustration files as {{ASSETS_BASE}}/<File>.png.

global_tokens.photo_slot: image dropped into a background-image url() — supply file:// (preferred, offline-safe) or https
global_tokens.illustration: none | {solid asset: Body|BodyFlower|Face1|Face2|FrontFace|HandFlower|HandPlant|HandRose × Black|White} | arch-sky (T5 CSS scene)
global_tokens.cta: none | READ MORE | TAP FOR MORE | link-in-bio

cervanttis.role: script — signatures, captions, display script, poll labels

lust.role: serif display — quotes, headlines, body of long-form, link lines

style_presets._about: Shared background/ink presets. Fill {{BG_COLOR}}/{{PANEL_BG}}, {{INK}}, {{SCRIM}} (and {{PHOTO_URL}} where used) by COPYING ONE ROW verbatim. The agent never invents a hex value.

photo-dark.note: photo bg + legibility scrim; set PHOTO_URL

photo-plain.note: photo bg, no scrim; set PHOTO_URL

t1_container_presets._about: T1 quote container. Copy one row into CONTAINER_BG / CONTAINER_INK / CONTAINER_PAD.

t1_attr_presets._about: T1 attribution style. role = printed name; signature = Cervanttis script. Copy one row into ATTR_FONT / ATTR_SIZE / ATTR_TRANSFORM.

t3_type_presets._about: T3 display typeface. Copy one row into TYPE_FONT / TYPE_SIZE / TYPE_TRANSFORM / TYPE_WEIGHT. For treatment{black-box-per-word} set WORD_BG=#000000, WORD_PAD="0.04em 0.18em"; for plain set WORD_BG=transparent, WORD_PAD=0.

t4_caption_presets._about: T4 caption style. Copy one row into CAPTION_FONT / CAPTION_SIZE / CAPTION_TRANSFORM / BAR_BG / BAR_INK.

t4_photo_presets._about: T4 photo treatment. Copy one row into PHOTO_INSET / FRAME_BG.

t5_visual_presets._about: T5 left visual column. Copy one row into LEFT_W / PHOTO_URL? / PHOTO_DISPLAY / ARCH_DISPLAY. (Set PHOTO_URL on the photo row.)

t8_label_presets._about: T8 poll label bar. Copy one row into BAR_BG / BAR_INK.

token_rules.Cervanttis_lowercase: Any Cervanttis value (T1 signature, T3 script phrase, T4 script caption, T8 label) MUST be lowercase.
token_rules.Lust_sentence_case: Lust values (quotes, headlines, body, link lines) are sentence case. T2 headline is rendered small-caps from sentence-case input.
token_rules.presets_verbatim: Style/preset tokens are filled by COPYING a preset row — never hand-typed hex.
token_rules.photos_local: Prefer file:// paths for photos (offline-safe render). Pre-download remote images first.
token_rules.keep_copy_short: T5/T6 body and T3 phrase are the overflow risks on the 1350 post canvas. The render validator fails on overflow — shorten copy or choose the other ratio.

templates.name: Quote / Testimonial
templates.purpose: Pull-quote with attribution (printed name+role, or script signature)
templates.sources: JPEG Robert Irwin footage quote; PSD D3 (Darren L), D4, D5 (Jean Houston)

templates.name: Statement + Attribution
templates.sources: JPEG Series Headline (REGIONAL SERIES, GIFT GUIDE); PSD D7

templates.name: Display Phrase
templates.purpose: One oversized word / short phrase as hero
templates.sources: JPEG WIN, giveaway time; PSD D2 (black-box caps), D6 (script "celebrate love")

templates.name: Captioned Photo
templates.purpose: Photo (full-bleed or offset block) + short caption
templates.sources: JPEG Lower-Third Label Box ("In the studio", "Just Arrived!"); PSD D1 (script caption)

templates.name: Long-form Story
templates.purpose: Serif headline + body paragraph on a panel, link-in-bio footer
templates.sources: JPEG only (Fortitude Valley, Tasmanian write-up, gift-guide body)

templates.name: Feature Card
templates.purpose: White-canvas editorial: serif headline + inset photo + body + CTA
templates.sources: JPEG only ("ask me anything / MEET KELLIE", "Corporate client gift ideas", "J.Crew launch")

templates.name: Link / CTA Card
templates.purpose: Near-empty canvas, one centred line + logo
templates.sources: JPEG only ("Head to the link in bio for our full guide")

templates.name: Illustration Hero
templates.purpose: Hero brand illustration + serif headline on paper/solid

slots.illustration: required (solid library; line-art TBC — see gaps)

gaps.line_art_library: UNCONFIRMED. PSDs D3/D4/D5/D8 use single-line drawings. T9 and the lineart variant of T1 currently use the locked SOLID illustration set (Black/White) as a stand-in. Decide: do the solids suffice, or must line-art be extracted from the PSD layers / supplied separately? Blocks only the true line-art look of T9 + T1.
gaps.logo_assets: The full horizontal lockup exists on the Shopify CDN (https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0657/8723/2489/files/F_B_Logo_Horizontal_BLK_914x200_0eb09d11-e91b-4f05-8ef4-9e54a99cb903.png). Templates currently render the logo as Lust text ("F&B" / "Fig & Bloom") for offline-safe rendering. Confirm whether a raster monogram + full lockup should be embedded as assets instead.
gaps.corpus_housekeeping: tmp/ must not ship. Recommendation (carried from design phase): push PSDs/JPGs to the R2 CDN (brand-cdn skill) and keep links only; the small font/illustration files already live in references/. tmp/ is .gitignored.
